title: lasthenia carnosa
intro: Lasthenia carnosa, also known as thin-leaved pygmy-plant or silky-leaved pygmy plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lasthenia carnosa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Lasthenia carnosa is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
